rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

sonuc.fr: Puissance du moteur de la pompe
sonuc.es: Potencia del motor de la bomba

hiddenLossDrivers: Low Q factor indicates broader frequency response.
suggestedActions: Verify component tolerances affect circuit performance.
Use proper safety equipment for high voltage/current work.

description.short: Calculate minimum fire pump motor power for hydrant system.
description.long: Calculate minimum fire pump motor power for hydrant system.

short_i18n.en: Calculate minimum fire pump motor power for hydrant system.
short_i18n.tr: Hidrant sistemini besleyecek pompanın minimum motor gücünü hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie die Mindestmotorleistung der Feuerlöschpumpe für das Hydrantensystem.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer la puissance minimale du moteur de la pompe à incendie pour un système de poteaux d'incendie.
short_i18n.es: Calcular la potencia mínima del motor de la bomba contra incendios para el sistema de hidrantes.
short_i18n.ar: حساب الحد الأدنى لقدرة محرك مضخة الحريق لنظام الحنفيات.
